title: erica eglandulosa
intro: Erica eglandulosa, also known as the woolly heath, is a flowering plant species in the heath family (Ericaceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Erica eglandulosa include alleviating symptoms of colds and flu, as well as its potential use in reducing stress and anxiety levels. In herbal preparations, Erica eglandulosa is often used as a dried herb in teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can also be found in combination with other herbs in traditional remedies.
